title: samolus repens var. repens
intro: Samolus repens var. repens, also known as dwarf waterwort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of dwarf waterwort include its ability to soothe sore throats, relieve congestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Samolus repens var. repens can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
